title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. Demonstrates IaC principles by contrasting manual AWS console setup with automated deployment using CDK, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway.
